
# cloudru_evolution_iam_api_key_product_collection (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudru_evolution_iam_api_key_product_collection" "datasource_api_key_product" {
}

output "data-api_key_product" {
  value = data.cloudru_evolution_iam_api_key_product_collection.datasource_api_key_product.products[0]
}
```

## Schema

### Read-Only

- `products` (Attributes List) Products - список продуктов. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--products))

<a id="nestedatt--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `products`

Read-Only:

- `code` (String) Code - код продукта.
- `description` (String) Description - описание продукта.
- `id` (String) ID - идентификатор продукта.
- `name` (String) Name - название продукта.
